code:
import collections

def edmonds_karp(graph, source, sink):
    n = len(graph)
    flow = 0
    
    residual_graph = [[graph[u][v] for v in range(n)] for u in range(n)]

    while True:
        parent = [-1] * n
        queue = collections.deque()
        queue.append(source)
        parent[source] = source

        path_found = False
        while queue:
            u = queue.popleft()
            for v in range(n):
                if parent[v] == -1 and residual_graph[u][v] > 0:
                    parent[v] = u
                    queue.append(v)
                    if v == sink:
                        path_found = True
                        break
            if path_found:
                break

        if not path_found:
            break

        path_flow = float('inf')
        s = sink
        while s != source:
            path_flow = min(path_flow, residual_graph[parent[s]][s])
            s = parent[s]

        s = sink
        while s != source:
            u = parent[s]
            residual_graph[u][s] -= path_flow
            residual_graph[s][u] += path_flow
            s = parent[s]

        flow += path_flow

    return flow, residual_graph

def get_min_cut(graph, source, sink):
    n = len(graph)

    max_flow, residual_graph = edmonds_karp(graph, source, sink)

    reachable = [False] * n
    q = collections.deque()
    q.append(source)
    reachable[source] = True

    while q:
        u = q.popleft()
        for v in range(n):
            if residual_graph[u][v] > 0 and not reachable[v]:
                reachable[v] = True
                q.append(v)

    S = []
    T = []
    
    for u in range(n):
        if reachable[u]:
            S.append(u)
        else:
            T.append(u)
    
    return S, T, max_flow
